productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Durante Black White Red Shoe
description: These lifestyle canvas shoes from adidas come with multi-purpose use. You can either fold the fold-over fabric collar to make it a low-cut shoe or open it up and wear it as a mid-cut. This absolutely stylish casual wear shoe provides superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. Team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperA striking creation with an option to wear it as high cut or mid-cut shoesHeavy cotton canvas uppers in red and black for snug Fit and protectionWhite cotton lace-ups with metallic eyelets for snug fit and durabilityBreathable canvas and upper re-enforcement with rubber friction compound for strength and longevityThree stripes in black as stylish brand symbol representing durability and eleganceMidsoleShock-absorbing rubber midsole for added comfortOutsoleDurable gum rubber outsole with multi-directional grooves for additional grip and stabilityAbrasion resistant foxing and toe-guard for additional protection and durability
